system_prompt: You handle support escalations. Be empathetic and efficient.
objective: Triage the caller's issue and either resolve or escalate to a human.

nodes.name: Triage
nodes.instruction: Ask the caller to describe their issue in one sentence.

nodes.name: Resolve
nodes.instruction: Walk the caller through self-service troubleshooting steps.

nodes.name: Handoff
nodes.static_text: Transferring you to a human agent now. Please hold.

nodes.name: Done
nodes.static_text: Glad we could resolve that. Have a good day.
